name: SmartLedger
prompt:
智能记账助手 - 首页是一个助手聊天对话框，支持小票上传 和 语音，文字输入，
用户输入语音文字或者图片后，推给一个用户消费明细，标题，金额，时间，分类，等信息，用户点击确认，保存一条账单信息，第二个tab是消费明细列表，支持名称和分类搜索，第三个tab是消费统计有各种维度的图标 第4个tab是设置页面，里面有很多设置，算力充值等等功能，主题色改变
designNotes: Modern minimalist aesthetic using a soft mint green (#4ADE80) primary color against clean white and light gray backgrounds to evoke financial clarity and calm. Rounded 16px corners on all cards and inputs, with generous whitespace and smooth micro-interactions for chat bubbles and confirmation states to reinforce the AI assistant persona.

screens.name: AI Assistant Chat
screens.purpose: User interacts with AI via voice, text, or receipt image to initiate expense logging.
keyElements: Scrollable chat message area with user/AI bubble alignment
Bottom input bar with microphone, camera/upload, and text field icons
Floating action button for quick manual entry fallback
Typing indicator animation when AI is processing receipt/voice
screens.html:
Good morning

Ledger AI

Hey Alex 👋 Snap a receipt, tell me what you spent, or just talk — I'll log it for you.

Lunch at Blue Bottle Cafe with Sarah, $34.50

Got it. Here's what I extracted:

Merchant Blue Bottle Cafe
Amount $34.50
Category Dining
Note with Sarah

Just grabbed this too

Reading receipt…

screens.name: Confirm Expense
screens.purpose: User reviews and edits AI-extracted expense details before saving to ledger.
keyElements: Editable form fields: title, amount, date/time picker, category dropdown
Thumbnail preview of uploaded receipt image at top
Primary 'Save' button fixed at bottom thumb zone
Secondary 'Discard' text link below save button

screens.name: Expense Ledger
screens.purpose: User browses, searches, and filters saved expense records by name or category.
keyElements: Sticky search bar with category filter chip selector
Chronological list of expense cards showing icon, title, amount, and date
Pull-to-refresh gesture indicator
Empty state illustration with prompt to add first expense

screens.name: Spending Analytics
screens.purpose: User visualizes spending patterns across time, category, and custom dimensions.
keyElements: Time range toggle (week/month/year) segmented control at top
Interactive donut chart for category breakdown
Bar chart comparing daily/weekly spending trends
Summary card showing total spent and top category

screens.name: Settings & Credits
screens.purpose: User manages app preferences, theme colors, and AI compute credits.
keyElements: Theme color picker grid with live preview swatches
Compute credits balance display with 'Recharge' CTA button
Grouped settings list: notifications, data export, account, privacy
Version number and logout option pinned to bottom
